channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road surface, 5th March
item.description:
Hole and loose chipping at corner of Austin Road and Marion Crescent. Reported on Monday, Council inspected and marked areas for repair in nearby Sidmouth Road, but appear to have overlooked this defect.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Austin Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several carrier bags of rubbish dumped on pathway, 5th March
item.description:
Several bags of rubbish (some containing decaying food) dumped on pathway outside ravens court and the playground. Rats and foxes observed near by.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unknown red bin caddy, 5th March
item.description:
Bin overflowing with rubbish for a while now, not belonging to this area. Please remove.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadowford Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress, 5th March
item.description:
Flytipped mattress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned and untaxed vehicle on road, 5th March
item.description:
Abandoned and untaxed vehicle on road outside 37/35 Kent House Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2nd report illegal parking same car, 5th March
item.description:
Same car parked again illegally and spent all night there. Resident of Pynfolds parking their car almost every night on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Paradise Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - dumping household rubbish, 5th March
item.description:
Someone dumping all their general waste - household rubbish on the pavement and street On the corner of Kemerton Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kemerton Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car with no/covered registration, 5th March
item.description:
Abandoned car with no/covered registration parked on road. Car is a blue BMW.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On edge of bank will fall down into stream, 5th March
item.description:
Abandoned Lime Bike on bank leading down to stream. Other Lime bikes nearby one semi blocking footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telford Road, New Southgate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 15 harvist road nw66eu, 5th March
item.description:
Regular site of fly tipping, ugly, dangerous for children, ruined due to rain.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Outside West Hampstead School, 5th March
item.description:
Street light removed without notice, the street is now very dark with a 75m stretch with no light which is not safe for residents or those using school facilities in the evening.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dornfell Street, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 238 Brook Street. Damaged pavement.ed pavement, 5th March
item.description:
There is damage to the pavement by the dropped kerb. This hole is approx 2 feet long and 6 inches wide and approx 2 inches deep This damage has existed for 6 months or so and getting worse. I have reported this recently and received an e.mail to say it had been resolved ! ! ! When there was some rain recently this hole filled with water - if it had been fixed it could not have been filled with water ! ! ! !
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 223, Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged vehicle abandoned on street, 5th March
item.description:
Damaged vehicle with no MOT abandoned on street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Charlton Church Lane, 5th March
item.description:
Child's push chair left on pavement outside no 28. Very little room left to pass on account of bollards at kerb edge.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More items dumped, 5th March
item.description:
Outside no 52: Flat screen tv. Outside nos 38-40: cardboard.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Fridge freezer and ottoman, 5th March
item.description:
Dumped items left on opposite sides of road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9-23, Englefield Crescent, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish spilt over pavement, 5th March
item.description:
Rubbish is spilling out of bins of HMO onto pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roydene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street drain completely covered by sand and other detritus, 5th March
item.description:
The drain completely covered at street level. No rainwater could possibly be evacuated.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rowan Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbour at number 10 persistently double parking, 5th March
item.description:
Neighbour at number 10 consistently double parks their car overnight instead of finding alternative parking elsewhere. This is extremely dangerous and is technically illegal. It happens on a weekly basis.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clyde Road, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: CW063 streetlight is not working, 5th March
item.description:
CW063 noted as not working at 06:15am
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bayliss Avenue, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
